channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump signs executive orders to boost quantum computing development
item.description: Quantum computing can increase processing power beyond that of a standard computer.

item.title: New York's 2026 primaries are here. Who is on the ballot?
item.description: New York voters will decide nominees in several high-profile races, including one featuring a Kennedy family member among the Democratic candidates.

item.title: New York House primaries test Mamdani's influence and other key races today
item.description: Voters head to the polls Tuesday for contests in New York, South Carolina, Maryland and Utah.

item.title: AI on track to bypass cybersecurity systems soon, Five Eyes spy partners warn
item.description: The most advanced AI models are improving quickly enough to outpace current cybersecurity knowledge within months, the Five Eyes intelligence alliance warns.
